title: $BYPASS
text: $BYPASS Set the host identifiers or IP addresses to which the UHTTP component should connect directly,and not through a proxy server. $BYPASS { = } HostList Arguments HostList —comma-separated list of host identifiers or IP addresses. Defaults Assignment file: application files Section: [PROXY_SETTINGS] Default value: none Description On Microsoft Windows systems, if $BYPASS is omitted, the UHTTP component uses the registry settings. [PROXY_SETTINGS] $BYPASS = www.company.com, aweb.* Copy Example: $BYPASS [PROXY_SETTINGS] $BYPASS = www.company.com, aweb.* Copy Related Links UHTTP The Uniface UHTTP component is an HTTP client that is used for sending and receiving HTTP requests and responses. It provides operations for executing HTTP requests used for web applications and RESTful web services. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
